entries.name: age-group-reconcile-defaults
entries.purpose: Daily 03:30 UTC. Verifies every (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple has exactly one is_default=true AgeGroup. Reports drift + optionally auto-heals per `age_group.reconciliation.auto_heal` config. Feeds the `academorix.age_group.default_invariant_drift.count` gauge.

entries.name: age-group-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Daily 04:30 UTC. Hard-delete AgeGroup rows past their 1095-day retention window IF no inbound FK still references them (snapshots don't count).

entries.name: age-group-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Hourly. Compute `academorix.age_group.active.count` per (is_youth, is_seeded) + `academorix.age_group.per_tenant.count` histogram + `academorix.age_group.purge_pending.count`. Publishes to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.

entries.name: age-group-cache-warm-default-catalog
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC. Re-parses `data/default-age-groups.json` + writes `age:default_catalog:v{version}`. Cheap idempotent task — mostly a safety net in case the file changed between deploys.

entries.name: age-group-invalidate-rolling-cutoffs
entries.purpose: Daily 00:05 UTC. Invalidates every `age:resolve:*` cache key. The rolling_from_birthday cutoff kind changes eligibility answers as the calendar rolls (an athlete becomes 13 today and moves out of U12); this task keeps cached answers fresh. Cheap — resolver cache TTL is 300s so at most 12 stale minutes per day even without this task.
